历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7559 → 6804 → 7357 → 7356 → 7700, showing a fluctuating trend overall. The baseline for 2025 is about 7700, with rankings slightly declining in recent two years. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 113 in 2021, 116 in 2022, 118 in 2023, 122 in 2024, and 118 in 2025. In 2026, Physics Category has 108 spots plus Medical Category 17 spots (both for Physics Category), totaling 125, an increase of about 5.9% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 22nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable at 21–22 in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (lingering impact of the 'study buddy' incident). Douyin popularity ranks 20th overall, rated 'high heat', with relatively high application attention. From 2023 to 2024, there were abnormal admission signals (significant drop in Journalism and Communication category ranking, decline in Sichuan admission cutoff), but no obvious gaps in 2025. Disciplines include Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, totaling 19 A- and above disciplines. Strong disciplinary strength, with advantageous disciplines like Mathematics, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 393,700, with Physics Category estimated at about 251,300 based on recent proportions, slightly increasing from 2025 (249,802), leading to a minor intensification of competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, with enrollment in Hubei Province accounting for about 2.5% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7700, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.9% intensifying competition, a slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, the offsetting effect of negative school reputation but high Douyin attention, and the continuous attraction of high-scoring candidates by advantageous disciplines (Mathematics A+, Clinical Medicine, etc.), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will further decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8000, with a range of 7500–8500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7500–8500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electrical, Automation, Electronic Information, Physics, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Mathematics, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Civil Engineering, Chemistry, Biology, etc.) as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7500), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 8500), prioritize stable Tier 2 majors.

预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1961 in 2025, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 significantly intensifying competition, a slight increase in the number of History Category examinees in the province, the school's reputation being relatively negative but offset by high Douyin popularity attention, and the continuous attraction of advantageous literature and history disciplines to examinees, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will further decline compared to 2025. prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 山东大学在湖北省医学类近四年（2022-2025）最低录取位次分别为6546名、6817名、7356名、8567名，呈持续上升态势，年均增幅约674名。招生计划方面，2022年18人、2023 年14人、2024年12人、2025年13人，整体呈缩招趋势。2026年医学类计划扩至17人，较2025年增加4人，扩招幅度约30.8%。扩招将增加录取名额，对位次产生下行压力，但医学报 考热度持续高涨，两者相互抵消。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，综合实力雄厚。其医学学科历史悠久，齐鲁医学品牌在全国享有盛誉，临床医学、口腔医 学等专业长期处于国内领先水平，对高分考生吸引力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考的热门方向，临床医学（5+3一体化、齐鲁医学堂）等顶尖专业竞争尤为激烈。山东大学地处济南，虽非一线城市，但作为传统医学强校，其医学专业 对湖北省考生的吸引力持续增强。2026年湖北省医学类招生规模扩大，但全国医学报考热度不减，预计竞争格局仍将保持高位。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年山东大学在湖北省医学类最低录取位次约为9949名，波动区间为9449名至10449名。相比2025年的8567名，位次继续上升（更难进 ），但受扩招影响上升幅度较前两年有所放缓。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Shandong University's minimum admission rankings for medical programs in Hubei Province over the past four years (2022-2025) were 6546, 6817, 7356, and 8567 respectively, showing a continuous upward trend with an average annual increase of about 674 places. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 18 students in 2022, 14 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 13 in 2025, showing an overall contraction trend. In 2026, the medical program plan expands to 17 students, an increase of 4 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 30.8%. The expansion will increase admission slots, exerting downward pressure on rankings, but the popularity of medical applications continues to rise, offsetting each other.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical disciplines have a long history, and the Qilu Medicine brand enjoys a high reputation nationwide. Clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors have long been at the leading domestic level, attracting high-scoring candidates strongly.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with top majors such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program, Qilu Medical Hall) being particularly competitive. Shandong University is located in Jinan, which is not a first-tier city, but as a traditional strong medical school, its medical programs continue to attract Hubei candidates. In 2026, the enrollment scale for medical programs in Hubei Province expands, but the national popularity of medical applications remains high, and the competitive landscape is expected to remain elevated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical programs in Hubei Province in 2026 will be approximately 9949, with a fluctuation range of 9449 to 10449. Compared to 8567 in 2025, the ranking continues to rise (harder to enter), but the rate of increase slows compared to the previous two years due to the expansion.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Qilu Medical Hall Innovation Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Preventive Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
